hooks.command: if [ -d .crabcc ]; then crabcc index --refresh >/dev/null 2>&1; else echo 'crabcc: no index in this repo (run /crabcc-init)' >&2; fi; command -v crabcc >/dev/null 2>&1 && crabcc shell context 2>/dev/null || true

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); session_id=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.session_id // ""'); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cwd // ""'); if [ -z "$cmd" ] || ! command -v crabcc >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; crabcc shell record --command "$cmd" ${cwd:+--cwd "$cwd"} --session-id "$session_id" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; crabcc shell rewrite --command "$cmd" ${cwd:+--cwd "$cwd"} --session-id "$session_id" 2>/dev/null || true; exit 0

input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); session_id=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.session_id // ""'); if [ -n "$file" ] && [ -f "$file" ] && command -v crabcc >/dev/null 2>&1; then CRABCC_SESSION_ID="$session_id" crabcc read "$file" --mode=full --session-id "$session_id" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; case "$file" in *.rs|*.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.py|*.go|*.java|*.kt|*.swift|*.cpp|*.cc|*.h|*.hpp) echo 'hint: `crabcc read --mode=auto` returns an outline stub on cache hit (~30x cheaper than full re-reads); the MCP `mcp__crabcc__read` tool exposes the same surface' >&2 ;; esac; fi; exit 0
if command -v crabcc >/dev/null 2>&1; then crabcc shell rewrite-measure 2>/dev/null || true; fi; exit 0
